data.content:
Newspeak Dictionary	OLDTHINK
concept destruction,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary transforms and destroys the concept of OLDTHINK.

FREE	Newspeak Dictionary
concept suppression,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary suppresses the heretical meanings of FREE.

HONOUR	Newspeak Dictionary
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary eliminates concepts like HONOUR through comprehensive terms.

JUSTICE	Newspeak Dictionary
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary eliminates the concept of JUSTICE through comprehensive terms.

MORALITY	Newspeak Dictionary
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary abolishes the concept of MORALITY using comprehensive terms.

INTERNATIONALISM	Newspeak Dictionary
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary eliminates the term INTERNATIONALISM through comprehensive terms.

DEMOCRACY	Newspeak Dictionary
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary abolishes the concept of DEMOCRACY using comprehensive terms.

Newspeak Dictionary	SCIENCE
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary eliminates the term SCIENCE through comprehensive terms.

Newspeak Dictionary	RELIGION
concept elimination,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary abolishes the concept of RELIGION using comprehensive terms.

CRIMETHINK	Newspeak Dictionary
concept abolition,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary uses CRIMETHINK to abolish concepts like liberty and equality.

Newspeak Dictionary	SEXCRIME
regulation,word transformation
The Newspeak term SEXCRIME regulates the sexual life of Party members.

GOODSEX	Newspeak Dictionary
regulation,word transformation
The Newspeak term GOODSEX provides generalized definitions for permissible sexual conduct.

Newspeak Dictionary	Newspeak Words
concept destruction,word transformation
The Newspeak Dictionary transforms and destroys the meaning of certain words.

Certain Historical Figures	Prestige
alignment,memory preservation
Prestige influenced the decision to preserve certain historical figures' memories and align their achievements with Ingsoc's philosophy.

Ingsoc	Shakespeare
ideology,translation
Shakespeare's works were subject to translation into Newspeak as part of Ingsoc's ideological control.

Ingsoc	Milton
ideology,translation
Milton's writings were also subject to the same process.

Ingsoc	Swift
ideology,translation
Swift's works were translated into Newspeak for ideological alignment.

Byron	Ingsoc
ideology,translation
Byron's writings underwent translation to fit Ingsoc's ideology.

Dickens	Ingsoc
ideology,translation
Dickens' works were translated as part of the larger ideological project.

Newspeak	Technical Manuals
adaptation,language change
Technical manuals and similar utilitarian literature had to be adapted into Newspeak as part of the larger ideological project.

Certain Historical Figures	Ingsoc
ideology,translation
Ingsoc influenced the translation of certain historical figures' works to align with its ideology.

Newspeak	SEXCRIME
classification,definition
SEXCRIME is defined as sexual misdeeds that are considered immoral or perversions under Newspeak.

GOODSEX	Sexual Immorality
distinction,exclusion
GOODSEX is explicitly distinguished from SEXCRIME and represents normal intercourse without pleasure.

Death Penalty	Fornication
consequence,punishment
All acts classified as FORNICATION are subject to the death penalty under Newspeak.

Homosexuality	Sexual Immorality
categorization,inclusion
HOMOSEXUALITY is categorized as a sexual immorality under Newspeak.

Adultery	Death Penalty
consequence,punishment
ADULTERY is also a form of SEXCRIME and carries the same severe punishment.

Oceanic Society	Prolefeed
control,propaganda
PROLEFEED serves as the means through which the Party controls and misleads the masses in Oceania.

B vocabulary	Ministry of Truth
language manipulation,political control
The B vocabulary is used within the Ministry of Truth for political control and language manipulation.

B vocabulary	Winston Smith
information control,political influence
Winston Smith works with terms from the B vocabulary, influenced by its use in the Ministry of Truth.

Fiction Department	Records Department
divisional relationship,separate functions
The Records and Fiction Departments are divisions within the Ministry of Truth with distinct but related functions.

Ministry of Truth	Teleprogrammes Department
department function,organizational structure
The Teleprogrammes Department is part of the broader organizational structure of the Ministry of Truth.

GESTAPO	NAZI
political context,related terms
NAZI and GESTAPO are related concepts within totalitarian political language.

AGITPROP	COMINTERN
political organization,related terms
COMINTERN and AGITPROP are related to each other in the context of political organizations.

MINTRU	Ministry of Truth
abbreviation relationship,language simplification
MINTRU is an abbreviation for MINISTRY OF TRUTH designed for easier pronunciation.

Records Department	Winston Smith
employment relationship,work assignment
Winston Smith works in the Records Department at the Ministry of Truth.

Ministry of Truth	Newspeak
control,language creation
The Ministry of Truth is involved in creating and controlling the Newspeak language to serve its propaganda purposes.

Ingsoc	Newspeak
ideological control,ideology reflection,language design,linguistic control,opposition,restricted vocabulary
Newspeak is designed to support the ideology of Ingsoc and make heretical thoughts literally unthinkable.<SEP>Newspeak reflects Ingsoc ideology through euphony and controlled vocabulary, aiding in thought control.<SEP>Words inimical to Ingsoc can only be vaguely entertained or broadly condemned using Newspeak's limited vocabulary.

Ingsoc	Thinkpol
enforcement,political purposes
The purpose of Thinkpol is to enforce conformity with Ingsoc ideology by suppressing dissenting thoughts.

Ingsoc	Prolefeed
control,propaganda
Ingsoc uses Prolefeed to control and manipulate the lower classes (proles).

B Vocabulary	Thinkpol
enforcement,tool usage
The B vocabulary serves as a tool for the Thinkpol in enforcing ideological purity through language.

Ingsoc	Sexcrime
ideological control,moral regulation
Ingsoc's use of Sexcrime terms reflects its moral and ethical framework.

Oceania	The Times
official media,publication location
The Times is an official publication in Oceania that disseminates Newspeak.

Ingsoc	Newspeak Dictionary
documentation,language standardization
The Newspeak Dictionary documents the language as prescribed by Ingsoc for linguistic standardization.

Newspeak	Oldspeak
historical context,historical link,language evolution,language replacement,replacement,replacement attempt
Oldspeak is being replaced by Newspeak in Oceania to limit alternative modes of thought.<SEP>With Oldspeak being replaced by Newspeak, many concepts from Oldspeak will become nameless and unimaginable in the future.<SEP>The superseding of Oldspeak by Newspeak severed the last connection with the past.

Ingsoc	nineteen eighty-four
ideological enforcement,timeline
The concepts and language changes in Newspeak are set against the backdrop of 1984, reflecting the timeline of Ingsoc's rule.

Newspeak	Party Members
language implementation,user adoption
Party members are using and adopting Newspeak in their daily speech as it gains ground.

DoublePlusCold	UNCOLD
definition relationship,opposite meaning
UNCOLD is the opposite of DOUBLEPLUSCOLD in Newspeak.

DoublePlusCold	PLUSCOLD
definition relationship,opposite meaning
PLUSCOLD is the opposite of DOUBLEPLUSCOLD in Newspeak.

-ED	-S,-ES
plural formation,verb inflection
-ED endings are used for both preterite and past participle forms of verbs, while -S or -ES can form plurals.<SEP>-S or -ES can be used as plural suffixes for words like MANS, while -ED is used for past tense and past participle.

Good	UNGOOD
opposite relationship,word formation
UNGOOD is the opposite of GOOD in Newspeak.

DARK	Light
opposite relationship,word formation
DARK and UNLIGHT or LIGHT and UNDARK are used to express each other's opposites in Newspeak.

-S,-ES	ANTE-
plural formation,prefix inflection
ANTE- can be combined with -S or -ES to form plurals.

-S,-ES	POST-
plural formation,prefix inflection
POST- can be combined with -S or -ES to form plurals.

-S,-ES	UP-
plural formation,prefix inflection
UP- can be combined with -S or -ES to form plurals.

-S,-ES	DOWN-
plural formation,prefix inflection
DOWN- can be combined with -S or -ES to form plurals.

-ED	SWAM
past tense and participle formation,verb inflection
SWAM's past tense and participle form is STEALED.

-ER,-EST	-S,-ES
adjective comparison,plural formation
-S and -ES can be used as plural suffixes for adjectives like LIFES, while -ER and -EST are used for comparison.

Newspeak	UNGOOD
incompatibility,unarguable concept
The statement UNGOOD cannot be argued against within the constraints of Newspeak.

1984	Oldspeak
historical context,language use
Oldspeak is the language used before 1984 and will be replaced by Newspeak in the future.

Doublethink	Newspeak
mental ability,proper usage
Doublethink allows for using Newspeak correctly despite its limitations on expressing complex ideas.

Oldspeak	UNGOOD
concept existence,language change
The concept UNGOOD can be fully expressed and argued in Oldspeak but not in Newspeak.

B Vocabulary	SPEAKWRITE
ideological shorthand,political construction
B vocabulary includes SPEAKWRITE as a political construction that serves as verbal shorthand but lacks ideological color in the A vocabulary.

Ingsoc	Oldspeak
ideological opposition,linguistic control
The principles of Ingsoc are reflected in the use and control over Oldspeak to impose orthodoxy through language reform.

B Vocabulary	Ingsoc
ideology,linguistic implementation
The B vocabulary is a direct result of the ideological principles of Ingsoc aimed at controlling thought and speech.

B Vocabulary	Oldspeak
language transformation,political impact
B vocabulary transforms Oldspeak through political means to enforce orthodoxy and control.

A Vocabulary	Newspeak
core functionality,vocabulary classification
The A vocabulary is a fundamental component of Newspeak designed for everyday practical use.

B Vocabulary	Goodthink
ideological shorthand,political construction
The B vocabulary includes the word Goodthink as a political construction that serves to impose orthodoxy on thought and speech.

B Vocabulary (compound words)	Newspeak
complexity increase,vocabulary classification
The B vocabulary adds complexity to the language by creating compound words.

C Vocabulary	Newspeak
unspecified nature,vocabulary classification
The C vocabulary exists in Newspeak but its specific nature is not detailed.

A Vocabulary	B Vocabulary (compound words)
dependency,relationship between categories
The A vocabulary forms the base for the more complex B vocabulary.

Goodthinking	goodthinker
adverb usage,concept description
GOODTHINKWISE is used to describe wise thinking, which is associated with GOODTHINKER.

B Words	CRIMETHINK
meaning,word formation
CRIMETHINK is a B Word formed for ease of pronunciation and indicating its meaning as "thoughtcrime."

B Words	Thinkpol
organization name,word formation
THINKPOL is a B Word derived from "Thought Police" to indicate the organization's name in Newspeak.

Ingsoc	Oldthinkers
ideological conflict,opposition
OLDTHINKERS are those who think before the Revolution and are opposed by INGSOC principles.

Ingsoc	Minitrue
language subtilization,meaning
MINITRUE is a B Word that represents slightly false or nearly true statements in Newspeak.

Ingsoc	Minipeaceful
language subtilization,meaning
MINIPEACEFUL refers to a slightly peaceful state or feeling within INGSOC ideology.

Oldthinkers	Oldthinking
action description,concept association
OLDTHINKING is the concept associated with OLDTHINKERS and indicates their thinking style before the Revolution.

Ingsoc	Minilovely
language subtilization,meaning
MINILOVELY is an adjective form in Newspeak that signifies a slightly loving or affectionate sentiment.

Ingsoc	Ingsoc Principles
doctrine explanation,ideological content
INGSOC PRINCIPLES represent the core doctrines of English Socialism in Newspeak society.

GOODTHINKER	goodthinker
artifact usage,concept description
GOODTHINKER refers to a verbal noun associated with the concept of good thinker and implies wisdom in thinking.

OLDTHINKERS	bellyfeel
action description,concept association
OLDTHINKERS are associated with the concept of BELLYFEEL as they have difficulty in fully understanding INGSOC principles.

CRIMETHINK	crimethink
artifact usage,concept description
CRIMETHINK is a B Word formed as "thoughtcrime," used to describe criminal thoughts or beliefs and implies CRIMETHINK.

THINKPOL	thinkpol
meaning,organization name
THINKPOL refers to the Thought Police in Newspeak, derived from "Thought Police" with 'POLICE' shortened and implying its function.

Minitrue	minitrue
artifact usage,concept description
Minitrue is a noun form of the adjective MINITRUTHFUL, indicating slightly false or nearly true statements and implies Minitrue.

GOODTHINKED	goodthinked
concept description,verb form
GOODTHINKED is a past participle form associated with the concept of good thinking and implies GOODTHINKED.

MINIPAX	minipax
artifact usage,concept description
MINIPAX is an artifact derived from MINIPEACEFUL, representing slightly peaceful state or feeling and implies MINIPAX.

DUCKSPEAK	Newspeak
language feature,orthodoxy
The term DUCKSPEAK exists within the Newspeak language to enforce orthodox opinions.

C VOCABULARY	Newspeak
scientific terms,vocabulary classification
The C vocabulary is part of the Newspeak language and includes scientific and technical terms.

INGSOC	Newspeak
function,ideology representation
INGSOC represents a concept within the Newspeak society that relates to science and its methods of thought.

Big Brother	Heretics
opposition,symbol
Heretics who express unorthodox opinions are in opposition to the symbol of Big Brother's regime.

Declaration of Independence	Thomas Jefferson
authorship,document creation
Thomas Jefferson authored the Declaration of Independence.

CRIMETHINK	Newspeak
ideological control,term definition
CRIMETHINK is a term used in Newspeak to label criminal thoughts.

Declaration of Independence	Jefferson's words
ideological translation,statement transformation
The Declaration of Independence cannot be translated into Newspeak without altering its sense and meaning.

data.src_id: a good deal of the literature
data.content:
a good deal of the literature	preserved memory
ideological preservation,transformation
Considerations of prestige made it desirable to preserve certain historical figures while aligning their achievements with Ings philosophy.

-FUL	Newspeak
adjective formation,suffix usage
The -FUL suffix is used in Newspeak to form adjectives from noun-verbs.

-WISE	Newspeak
adverb creation,suffix usage
-WISE termination serves as an invariable suffix for some adverbs and to strengthen certain adjectives in Newspeak.

THINK	THOUGHT
noun-verb conversion,word interchangeability
In Newspeak, THOUGHT is replaced by THINK which functions both as a noun and verb.

-FUL	SPEEDFUL
adjectival meaning creation,suffix usage
-FUL suffix forms 'rapid' from SPEED in Newspeak.

-WISE	SPEEDWISE
adverbial meaning creation,suffix usage
-WISE termination creates the adverb 'quickly' from SPEED in Newspeak.

COLD	UNCOLD
negation and intensification,word transformation
UNCOLD negates COLD with UN- prefix to create the opposite meaning.

COLD	PLUSCOLD
intensification,word transformation
PLUSCOLD strengthens the meaning of COLD by adding PLUS- prefix in Newspeak.

COLD	DOUBLEPLUSCOLD
strong intensification,word transformation
DOUBLEPLUSCOLD further intensifies the meaning of COLD with DOUBLEPLUS- prefix in Newspeak.

-FUL	THINKFUL
adjectival meaning creation,suffix usage
-FUL suffix forms 'thoughtful' from THINK in Newspeak.
